# DirectorsInsurance.co.nz — LLM Reference File

## About This Site

DirectorsInsurance.co.nz is a New Zealand insurance lead referral website specialising in Directors & Officers (D&O) insurance and related management liability products. We connect directors, executives, trustees, and business owners with licensed New Zealand insurance advisers who provide personalised quotes and advice.

**Website:** https://directorsinsurance.co.nz
**Phone:** 09 885 9549
**Email:** hello@cover4you.co.nz
**Operated by:** Cover4You — NZ Insurance Referral Network

## What We Do

We are NOT an insurance company or registered insurer. We operate a lead referral service. When you submit a quote request, we connect you with a licensed Financial Advice Provider (FAP) who will contact you to discuss your needs, provide advice, and arrange cover through a licensed NZ insurer.

All advisers in our network are licensed under the Financial Services Legislation Amendment Act 2019 (FSLAA 2019) and regulated by the Financial Markets Authority (FMA).

## Coverage Types

### Directors & Officers Insurance (D&O)
- Protects individual directors and officers from personal liability claims
- Covers wrongful acts, mismanagement, employment disputes, regulatory investigations
- Typical premium: $1,200–$4,500/yr
- URL: https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/coverage/directors-and-officers/

### Management Liability Insurance
- Broader coverage for the management team and the company entity
- Covers D&O, employment practices, crime, statutory liability in one policy
- Typical premium: $2,500–$8,000/yr
- URL: https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/coverage/management-liability/

### Professional Indemnity Insurance
- Covers claims arising from professional services, advice, or errors
- Essential for directors of professional services firms
- Typical premium: $800–$3,500/yr
- URL: https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/coverage/professional-indemnity/

### Statutory Liability Insurance
- Covers fines, penalties, and legal defence costs under NZ statutes
- Covers Health & Safety at Work Act, Resource Management Act, Companies Act breaches
- Typical premium: $600–$2,000/yr
- URL: https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/coverage/statutory-liability/

## Who We Help

### SME Directors
- Directors of small to medium NZ businesses with up to 200 staff
- URL: https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/for-directors/sme-directors/

### Startup Founders
- Founders and early-stage company directors in NZ
- URL: https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/for-directors/startup-founders/

### Non-Executive Directors (NEDs)
- Independent directors serving on NZ company boards
- URL: https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/for-directors/non-executive-directors/

### Listed Company Directors
- Directors of NZX-listed companies or those with public shareholders
- URL: https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/for-directors/listed-company-directors/

### Trustees & Charities
- Board members of charitable trusts, incorporated societies, and NFPs
- URL: https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/for-directors/trustees-and-charities/

### CEOs & Senior Management
- Senior executives who may face personal liability under NZ law
- URL: https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/for-directors/ceos-and-senior-management/

## Key Facts About Directors Insurance in NZ

- Under the Companies Act 1993, directors can be personally liable for company debts in certain circumstances
- The Health & Safety at Work Act 2015 (HSWA) imposes personal duties on company officers
- FMA can pursue directors personally for securities law breaches
- D&O insurance does NOT cover fraud, wilful misconduct, or criminal acts
- Most NZ D&O policies are "claims-made" — cover must be in force when claim is made
- Continuous cover is critical; gaps in coverage can leave directors unprotected
- Many company constitutions require D&O insurance for directors
- Startup founders with investor backing often required to hold D&O by their term sheets

## Insurers in NZ D&O Market

Major insurers providing D&O and management liability in New Zealand include:
- Chubb Insurance NZ
- AIG NZ
- QBE Insurance NZ
- Berkley Insurance Australia (operating in NZ)
- Vero Insurance NZ
- Gallagher (broker/underwriting agency)

## Regulatory Framework

- **Financial Markets Authority (FMA):** Regulates financial advice in NZ — fma.govt.nz
- **Insurance (Prudential Supervision) Act 2010:** Governs licensed insurers
- **FSLAA 2019:** Requires all financial advisers to hold a licence
- **Companies Act 1993:** Directors' duties and personal liability provisions
- **HSWA 2015:** Officer duties and personal liability for workplace health and safety
- **Reserve Bank of NZ (RBNZ):** Prudential supervision of insurers

## Common Questions

**Q: Is D&O insurance compulsory in NZ?**
A: Not legally required, but many company constitutions and investor agreements require it. Highly recommended for any director given personal liability exposure.

**Q: What does D&O insurance NOT cover?**
A: Fraud, wilful misconduct, criminal acts, bodily injury/property damage (covered by other policies), and known circumstances at policy inception.

**Q: How much does D&O insurance cost in NZ?**
A: Typically $1,200–$4,500/yr for SME directors. Listed company directors or those at high-risk organisations pay more. Get a free quote through our site.

**Q: Can directors be personally sued in NZ?**
A: Yes. Under the Companies Act 1993, HSWA 2015, and securities law, directors face personal liability. D&O insurance covers legal defence costs and settlements.

**Q: What is a "claims-made" policy?**
A: Cover is triggered when the claim is made (not when the alleged wrongful act occurred). This means continuous coverage is essential — don't let your policy lapse.

## Contact & Quotes

To get a quote or speak to an adviser:
- **Online form:** https://directorsinsurance.co.nz/contact/
- **Phone:** 09 885 9549
- **Email:** hello@cover4you.co.nz

Response time: We aim to connect you with an adviser within 1 business day.
